name: cs-device-details

outputs.description: The ID to retrieve details for. Supports comma-separated list of IDs. Endpoint.ID Unique ID of the endpoint in FalconHost
outputs.name: FalconHostDetails

outputs.description: IPAddress of the endpoint Endpoint.Domain Domain of the endpoint
outputs.name: Endpoint.IPAddress

outputs.description: MAC address of the endpoint Endpoint.OS OS of the endpoint
